query:
UPDATE users SET
  name = REPLACE(name, 'Mr. ', 'Mr '),
  fullName = REPLACE(fullName, 'Mr. ', 'Mr ')
WHERE auditRole = 'consultant' AND fullName LIKE 'Mr. %';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 24SvJuQr6QY484E.95c64ef18b07 --database 436kjx9HnHs4DfQBN2oU96 --execute
